title: Clean PvP texturepack
description: Overall, this texture pack offers a minimalist and aesthetic look, while still retaining key features that help maintain the clarity and tidiness of the interface. It's a great choice for players who prefer a clean and organized style.
body:
```
🗡️ Clean PvP Pack by Kerfuss_ 🎯
Looking for a clean and lightweight resource pack to help you dominate PvP in Minecraft?
Clean PvP Pack is designed for players who value clarity, simplicity, and performance.
```

# **REQ: OPTIFINE or CIT RESEWN**
![FEATURE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29112fe9950434b95c867f908c46ca35736d1bae.png)

🔹 **Minimal sword & weapon textures** – easy to recognize and clean for fast PvP action

🔹 **Simplified tools** – clearly distinguishable at a glance (stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite)

🔹 **Clear inventory UI** – designed for quick reaction and easier item management

🔹 **PvP essentials in focus** – golden apples, ender pearls, totems, potions, and more are sharp and visible

🔹 **FPS-friendly** – no unnecessary shaders or heavy effects; runs smoothly on any setup

🔹 **Pure PvP aesthetic** – no distractions, just the textures you need to improve and win


## 🧠 **Who is this pack for?**
Perfect for PvP players – from beginners to pros – who want to get better and focus on skill without messy visuals.



### BENEFITS

✅ **Clean visuals**

⚔️ **Perfect for PvP**

🎯 **Helps you focus and improve**

🚀 **FPS-friendly and lightweight**

🎮 **Level up your PvP with a clean setup!**
